DROP TABLE [ods].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [ods].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]
( 
	[FIRST_NAME] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[LAST_NAME] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[ASSOCIATE_ID] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[FLSA_DESCRIPTION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[PAY_CLASS] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[DIVISION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[PAY_DATE] [date]  NULL,
	[TIME_IN] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIME_OUT] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[HOURS] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[EARNINGS_CODE] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[WORKED_DEPARTMENT] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[APPROVE] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME] [varchar](100)  NULL,
	[InsertedDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[ref_file] [nvarchar](2000)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
